name: Admin Upload Knowledge Intake
purpose: Define safe intake boundaries for a future Admin Console upload flow that can collect source material, extract approved content, and write machine-readable knowledge records without storing real files productively before security and governance prerequisites are complete.

allowedUploadTypes.label: Markdown
allowedUploadTypes.notes: Text-first source material suitable for later structured extraction.

allowedUploadTypes.label: Text
allowedUploadTypes.notes: Plain text source material suitable for later structured extraction.

allowedUploadTypes.label: JSON
allowedUploadTypes.notes: Machine-readable source material that still requires schema validation and redaction checks.

allowedUploadTypes.label: PDF
allowedUploadTypes.notes: PDF intake is blocked until a parser, extraction boundary, file-size limit, and sanitization strategy are selected.

allowedUploadTypes.label: Images
allowedUploadTypes.notes: Image intake is blocked until media analysis, metadata stripping, safety review, and OCR policy are selected.

blockedUploads.label: Secrets
blockedUploads.rule: Always reject and do not store.

blockedUploads.label: Private Schlüssel
blockedUploads.rule: Always reject and do not store.

blockedUploads.label: Produktionsdaten
blockedUploads.rule: Always reject unless a separate approved data-protection process exists.

blockedUploads.label: Sensible Gesundheitsdaten
blockedUploads.rule: Always reject for this admin knowledge-intake flow.

blockedUploads.label: Kinderdaten
blockedUploads.rule: Always reject for this admin knowledge-intake flow.

blockedUploads.label: Zahlungsdaten
blockedUploads.rule: Always reject for this admin knowledge-intake flow.

activationPrerequisites: Admin authentication and role checks are defined and enforced server-side.
Storage Rules are written, reviewed, and tested before any real file persistence.
Malware scanning and file-type verification are selected and documented.
Audit logging captures actor, timestamp, source, declared type, validation result, redaction state, and write target.
Size limits, retention rules, deletion flow, and failure handling are approved.
Redaction and blocked-content detection are defined before extracted text becomes searchable knowledge.

extractionPolicy.target: Extracted approved content must be written in machine-readable form to this Knowledge-Intake register or to a later approved database.
futureWriteTargets: project-register/admin-upload-knowledge-intake.json as a static reviewed intake register
future server-authorized knowledge_intake database collection after Auth, Rules, malware/file-type checks, audit log, and retention policy exist

copyRequirements: Make clear that uploads are not active.
Show allowed and deferred upload types.
State that extracted content must become machine-readable register/database content only after review.

nextRecommendedTask: Design server-side Auth, Storage Rules, malware/file-type verification, audit-log schema, and retention policy before enabling any upload handler.
